caption: In a large, brightly lit hall with an arched ceiling and beige walls, two couples are practicing a dance on a vast blue floor. In the foreground, a woman dressed in a white top and white trousers dances with a man wearing a dark t-shirt and white trousers. Behind them, another couple consists of a woman in a light green outfit and a man in a dark t-shirt and blue jeans. Both couples are engaged in a rhythmic dance, moving their arms and stepping across the blue surface. In the background, a crowd of people sits at long tables covered with white cloths, watching the performance. As the sequence progresses, the couples shift their positions and posture, with the woman in white and the man in blue jeans adjusting their movements in synchronization with their partners. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
